[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00011101 4
1 01111000 4
2 11011110 6
3 00111111 6
4 01111101 6
5 11111111 a
6 10101111 6
7 01111111 7

01 10 00011111 5
12 21 01111101 6 match 4
23 32 11111100 6
34 43 11111111 a match 5
45 54 01111111 7 match 7
56 65 01111111 7 match 7
67 76 11101111 7
70 07 10101111 6 match 6

13 31 11011101 6
24 42 01111111 7 match 7
35 53 11111101 7
46 64 01101111 6
57 75 11111101 7

71 17 10111101 6

14 41 00111111 6 match 3
25 52 01111101 6 match 4
36 63 11111111 a match 5
47 74 10101111 6 match 6
50 05 01111111 7 match 7
61 16 01111111 7 match 7
72 27 11111101 7

04 40 00101111 5
15 51 01111101 6 match 4
26 62 01111111 7 match 7
37 73 11111101 7
